Title: Trading Basics
Description: Learn how to trade resources and make profits at space stations.

Steps.Title: Introduction to Trading
Steps.Message: Trading is a lucrative way to earn credits in Codename: Subspace. You can buy low and sell high to make profits!

Steps.Title: Finding Stations
Steps.Message:
Space stations are your trading hubs:
• Stations appear on your radar and galaxy map
• Different stations trade different goods
• Approach a station and dock to access trading
• Look for stations marked with trading icons

Steps.Title: Trading Interface
Steps.Message:
When docked at a station:
• Open the trading menu
• View available goods and their prices
• BUY goods when prices are low
• SELL goods when prices are high
• Watch your cargo capacity limits

Steps.Title: Trade Goods
Steps.Message:
Common trade goods include:
• Raw materials (Iron, Titanium, etc.)
• Processed goods (Steel, Electronics)
• Consumer goods (Food, Medicine)
• Luxury items (Artwork, Rare artifacts)

Each sector has different supply and demand, affecting prices.

Steps.Title: Trading Strategy
Steps.Message:
Profitable trading tips:
• Buy resources in mining sectors (cheap)
• Sell resources in industrial sectors (expensive)
• Monitor price trends over time
• Invest in larger cargo holds for more profit
• Watch for special trade missions with bonuses

Steps.Title: Complete Your First Trade
Steps.Message: Now find a station and complete a trade! Buy or sell something to learn the system.

Steps.Title: Trading Complete!
Steps.Message: Great job! You've learned the basics of trading. Keep exploring sectors to find the best trade routes!
